name: godaddy-domains
description: Codex plugin wrapper for GoDaddy's read-only Domains MCP endpoint for availability checks and domain ideas.

interface.shortDescription: Check domain availability and brainstorm domain ideas.
interface.longDescription: A community Codex plugin wrapper around GoDaddy's public read-only Domains MCP endpoint for domain availability checks and suggestions.
defaultPrompt: Find domain ideas for a privacy-first analytics product.
Find available domains for an AI bookkeeping app.
